title: llms.txt and llms-full.txt (was jssm#858)
manager: Add llms.txt and llms-full.txt to fsl.tools (was jssm#858) — the emerging convention that hands LLM crawlers a clean, curated map of the docs. It's the machine-readable front door for models: instead of scraping messy HTML, a model gets a purpose-built digest of what FSL is and how to use it.
cs: generated from the same docs tables as the human docs (per the v16 umbrella), so it never drifts from the site.
